get.summary: List every body that links to a target entity

post.summary: Trigger a full vault index rebuild
Drop and re-derive the vault database
post.description: Manual hard reset: drops the vault DB and rebuilds it from the vault. Recovers from DB corruption / schema drift that a plain rebuild cannot fix. Discards DB-only state (fragment_stats telemetry, dismissed UUID_COLLISION warnings).

get.summary: List current (non-dismissed) vault warnings

post.summary: Dismiss an event warning (state warnings cannot be dismissed)

200.description: Warning dismissed; returns the remaining warnings

400.description: Warning is a state warning and cannot be dismissed

get.summary: Get the current/active suggested fragment for suggestion mode

200.description: Current suggestion or null when no current suggestion is set

put.summary: Set the current-suggestion pointer to a specific fragment (e.g. after browser back-navigation).

get.summary: Get the next suggested fragment for suggestion mode

schema.description: UUID of the currently displayed fragment to exclude from selection

parameters.description: UUID of the currently displayed fragment to exclude from selection
parameters.name: exclude

200.description: Next suggestion or null when pool is empty

post.summary: Record a voluntary fragment open outside suggestion mode
Record an explicit user pick (e.g. quick-switcher): bumps voluntary_open_count, adds to cooldown, marks user-picked so the next getNext skips avoidance accounting for the picked fragment.

List recent action log entries for a project

post.summary: Create a named sequence

get.summary: Get the main sequence (auto-creates if none exists)
Get a sequence by UUID (full)

patch.summary: Rename or set a sequence as main

delete.summary: Delete a sequence (refuses if it is main)

200.description: Sequence deleted, bundle of remaining sequences

get.summary: Get per-fragment markdown content for a sequence (placed, ordered) plus the pool

200.description: Ordered placed-fragment content and pool-fragment content

post.summary: Make a secondary sequence the main sequence
Place a fragment into a position in the sequence

patch.summary: Move an already-placed fragment to a new position

delete.summary: Remove a fragment from the sequence (return it to the pool)

post.summary: Append a new section to a sequence

patch.summary: Rename a section within a sequence

delete.summary: Delete a section; its fragments return to the sequence pool

patch.summary: Move a section to a new position within its sequence

post.summary: Group a set of placed fragments into a new section
Move a set of placed fragments into an existing section as a block

404.description: Sequence, section, or fragment not found

post.summary: Split a section at a marked fragment, inserting a new section boundary
Merge a section into the one immediately below it (drops the boundary)

409.description: Section has no following section to merge with

post.summary: Clone a sequence into a fresh independent copy

201.description: Sequence cloned, bundle of all sequences

post.summary: Insert another sequence's sections into this one at a section index

404.description: Target or source sequence not found

post.summary: Import a .md, .txt, or .docx file as fragments

200.description: Import completed — check errors[] for per-piece failures

400.description: Invalid options payload or missing fields

post.summary: Preview how a .md, .txt, or .docx file would be split into fragments
post.description: Returns the proposed pieces assembled into a single markdown string (with per-piece anchors) plus a lean nav payload — the same { markdown, sections } shape as sequence preview.

200.description: Assembled markdown + per-piece nav for the fragments that would be created

400.description: Invalid options payload or missing fields

post.summary: Preview how a fragment would divide into pieces along a delimiter
post.description: Read-derivation: runs the shared split engine over the fragment's body and returns a lean piece list (pieceIndex, key, excerpt) plus a count. Writes nothing. Piece 1 reports the original's existing key; pieces 2…N report deriveKey-derived keys.

200.description: The pieces the split would produce, plus their count

post.summary: Split a fragment into multiple fragments along a delimiter
post.description: Identity-preserving split: the original is truncated to piece 1 (keeping uuid, key, aspects, readiness, references) and pieces 2…N become new fragments inheriting its aspects + references, inserted immediately after it in every sequence it is placed in. Records a single non-undoable fragment:split action-log entry.

200.description: The split result: source uuid + the created pieces

400.description: The delimiter yields a single piece — nothing to split

get.summary: Assemble a sequence into a markdown string plus lean nav payload

post.summary: Export a sequence to a file (md, txt, or docx)

post.summary: Create a new draft (snapshot) of the project

409.description: Name conflict or another draft operation in progress

post.summary: Restore the project to a draft (with optional pre-restore safety snapshot)

get.summary: List all entities that currently have an unsaved-content swap file

200.description: Swap entries for every entity with unsaved content

put.summary: Write a swap file for unsaved entity content

get.summary: Read the swap file for unsaved entity content

200.description: Swap content; content and savedAt are null when no swap exists

delete.summary: Delete the swap file for an entity (idempotent)
